'''Raines''' was a [[Major/Legends|Major]] assigned to the [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']] around the time of the [[Caamas Document Crisis]] in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]]. He was well-versed in [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] walker combat, which very likely points to a posting an armor officer within the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
